title: Why did Kai Cenat disappear from streaming? Everything ahead of his July 6 return stream
summary_full: Kai Cenat will return to streaming on July 6 at 8 PM EST after spending months away from live content. During the break, he focused on his fashion brand Vivet, personal growth and creative projects. His comeback stream is expected to reveal key Streamer University 2026 details and will likely be his first simultaneous broadcast on Twitch and YouTube.
